name: Create domain writes hosts and Apache vhost config
details: hosts + vhost files generated with PHP mapping for alpha.test

name: Update domain rewrites files and restarts Apache when running
Delete domain removes managed hosts entries but preserves manual entries
details: Managed block removed while manual hosts entries remained intact

name: Domain create succeeds even if Apache restart fails
details: Domain gamma.test created successfully. Apache restart failed (MOCK_RESTART_FAILURE).
